revision_note: Completed Repository Archaeology Engine with fragment extraction, subsystem inference, deletion detection, reconstruction, capability graph, and Evolution Intelligence integration.

initiatives.notes: COMPLETED: Full Repository Archaeology Engine implementation with 5 core modules: Fragment Extractor (AST-aware extraction), Subsystem Inference (clustering/co-change), Partial Deletion Detector (resurrection candidates), Reconstruction Engine (patch generation), Capability Graph (provenance tracking). Includes CLI orchestrator and Evolution Intelligence integration. Enables automatic capability resurrection from git history.
components: Fragment Extractor - AST-aware code fragment extraction with deletion detection
Subsystem Inference - Clustering and co-change pattern detection
Partial Deletion Detector - Identifies deleted capabilities worth resurrecting
Reconstruction Engine - Generates git-applicable resurrection patches
Capability Graph - DOT/JSON provenance tracking with query engine
Evolution Integration - Feeds archaeology events into Evolution Ledger
